extraction.one_line_summary: DEGENKOLB John won from a 17km breakaway with VAN AVERMAET Greg and LAMPAERT Yves after attrition split the field across cobbled sectors.
tactical_patterns: STUYVEN Jasper attacked early forcing chase group energy expenditure, enabling DEGENKOLB's decisive 17km counter with VAN AVERMAET/LAMPAERT.
FROOME Chris attacked after his own crash in closing kilometers when teammates still available, revealing Sky's dual-race aggression philosophy.
Eight-rider teams proved insufficient for GC protection: BARDET repeatedly isolated after mechanicals despite teammates shuttling back multiple times.
MOVISTAR defied pre-race cobble weakness expectations with QUINTANA marking FROOME's late attack, suggesting superior equipment/recon preparation than anticipated.

rider_signals.DEGENKOLB John: positive: First Tour stage win post-2016 injury by attacking at 17km on cobbles, demonstrating restored top-end power on specialist terrain.
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: positive: Retained yellow and finished second after slowing for FROOME crash then chasing back, showing unusual combination of sportsmanship and resilience.
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: positive: Strongest GC rider across cobbles per commentary, signals underrated pavé handling for non-Classics specialist.
rider_signals.URÁN Rigoberto: negative: Lost 2:48 after crash and slow bike change with teammates unable to close gap, exposed team's cobble weakness.
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: Multiple punctures across 10+ cobble sectors with teammates exhausting firepower, yet limited losses suggest individual damage control skill.
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: Attacked in closing kilometers immediately after crashing over MOSCON's bike, revealing exceptional recovery speed and tactical opportunism.
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: Moved to virtual yellow by 55 seconds over FROOME, suggesting superior cobble positioning throughout rather than teammate protection.
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: Marked FROOME's late attack and finished in lead group despite pre-race concerns, indicating MOVISTAR's recon work paid off.
rider_signals.JUNGELS Bob: neutral: Led chase group with SAGAN but couldn't close 17km gap, confirming cobble strength insufficient without earlier positioning.
rider_signals.LAMPAERT Yves: positive: Made winning 17km move despite teammate STUYVEN in earlier break, showing Quick-Step's depth allows redundant attacks.
